import source
import pytest


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_bitcount_reveals_xor_bug():
    """Test bitcount(127) reveals the XOR bug.

    127 = 0b1111111 has 7 bits set.
    The buggy version uses XOR (n ^= n-1) instead of AND (n &= n-1).
    XOR doesn't clear the lowest bit, causing an infinite loop.
    """
    result = source.bitcount(127)
    assert result == 7
